title: Self-Hosted Serving Selection — llama.cpp, Ollama, TGI, vLLM, SGLang

questions.question: Which engine does the lesson pick as the dev-laptop one-command default?
questions.question_zh: 课程选择哪个引擎作为开发笔记本的一键默认引擎？

questions.question: What 2025 event changes the default away from TGI for new projects?
questions.question_zh: 2025 年哪个事件让新项目的默认选择不再是 TGI？
options: TGI entered maintenance mode on December 11, 2025 — only bug fixes going forward
options_zh: TGI 放弃 CUDA 支持
TGI 于 2025 年 12 月 11 日进入维护模式——此后只修 bug

questions.question: Which hardware constraint forces llama.cpp and excludes vLLM / TRT-LLM?
questions.question_zh: 哪种硬件限制会强制使用 llama.cpp 而排除 vLLM / TRT-LLM？

questions.question: Which engine does the lesson position for agentic multi-turn and prefix-heavy workloads thanks to RadixAttention?
questions.question_zh: 课程中提到，哪个引擎因为 RadixAttention 而适合 agentic 多轮对话和 prefix 密集型工作负载？

questions.question: What dev-to-prod pipeline does the lesson recommend on the same GGUF or HF weights?
questions.question_zh: 课程推荐在同一套 GGUF 或 HF 权重上使用什么样的开发到生产流水线？
options: Ollama in dev and Ollama in prod
Ollama in dev, llama.cpp in staging, vLLM (or SGLang for prefix-heavy) in prod
options_zh: 开发用 Ollama，生产也用 Ollama
开发用 Ollama，预发用 llama.cpp，生产用 vLLM（或 prefix 密集时用 SGLang）

questions.question: Why is Ollama discouraged for shared production?
questions.question_zh: 为什么不建议在共享生产环境中使用 Ollama？
options: Go HTTP serialization adds overhead, concurrency management is simpler than vLLM, and OpenTelemetry support lags
options_zh: 它只能在 Windows 上运行
Go HTTP 序列化增加开销，并发管理比 vLLM 简单，OpenTelemetry 支持滞后
